_comment: TEMPLATE ONLY — placeholders, no real secrets. Copy the values you need into User Secrets (development) or set them as environment variables / AWS Secrets Manager entries (production). Double-underscore (__) is the environment-variable form of a colon (:). See docs/SECRETS_INVENTORY.md for the full inventory and recommended AWS Secrets Manager paths.

Jwt.Key: <32+ character random secret — generate with: openssl rand -base64 48>
